series_metadata.series_title: Application for Registration as an Ohio Withholding Agent
series_metadata.series_description: This form is used for employers to register as an Ohio Witholding agen. An Ohio tax identification is issued to the employer along with a remittance coupon book containing forms for filing and remitting payments. Employers should register within 15 days from start of their business.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: original scanned into ODT Info Image System ; Electronic: Electronic record is kept via ODT Info Image System
